title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Amrapali Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Amrapali Group
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
